mapper.select: SELECT mf.ORG_ID AS orgId, mf.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID AS messageFieldId, mf.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, mf.DATA_TYPE AS dataType, mf.DATA_LENGTH AS dataLength, mf.SCALE AS scale, mf.ALIGN AS align, mf.FILLER AS filler, mf.FIELD_TYPE AS fieldType, mf.USE_MODE AS useMode, mf.REQUIRED_YN AS requiredYn, mf.FIELD_TAG AS fieldTag, mf.CODE_GROUP AS codeGroup, mf.DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, mf.TEST_VALUE AS testValue, mf.REMARK AS remark, mf.LOG_YN AS logYn, mf.CODE_MAPPING_YN AS codeMappingYn, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME AS messageFieldName, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC AS messageFieldDesc, mf.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, mf.VALIDATION_RULE_ID AS validationRuleId, mf.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, mf.FIELD_FORMAT AS fieldFormat, mf.FIELD_FORMAT_DESC AS fieldFormatDesc, mf.FIELD_OPTION AS fieldOption, mf.FIELD_REPEAT_CNT AS fieldRepeatCnt FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD mf WHERE mf.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND mf.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} AND mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID = #{messageFieldId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD ( ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_FIELD_ID, SORT_ORDER, DATA_TYPE, DATA_LENGTH, SCALE, ALIGN, FILLER, FIELD_TYPE, USE_MODE, REQUIRED_YN, FIELD_TAG, CODE_GROUP, DEFAULT_VALUE, TEST_VALUE, REMARK, LOG_YN, CODE_MAPPING_YN, MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, VALIDATION_RULE_ID, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, FIELD_FORMAT, FIELD_FORMAT_DESC, FIELD_OPTION, FIELD_REPEAT_CNT ) VALUES ( #{dto.orgId}, #{dto.messageId}, #{dto.messageFieldId}, #{dto.sortOrder,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dto.dataType}, #{dto.dataLength,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dto.scale,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dto.align}, #{dto.filler}, #{dto.fieldType}, #{dto.useMode}, #{dto.requiredYn}, #{dto.fieldTag}, #{dto.codeGroup}, #{dto.defaultValue}, #{dto.testValue}, #{dto.remark}, #{dto.logYn}, #{dto.codeMappingYn}, #{dto.messageFieldName}, #{dto.messageFieldDesc}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{dto.validationRuleId}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.fieldFormat}, #{dto.fieldFormatDesc}, #{dto.fieldOption}, #{dto.fieldRepeatCnt,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )

INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD ( ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_FIELD_ID, SORT_ORDER, DATA_TYPE, DATA_LENGTH, SCALE, ALIGN, FILLER, FIELD_TYPE, USE_MODE, REQUIRED_YN, FIELD_TAG, CODE_GROUP, DEFAULT_VALUE, TEST_VALUE, REMARK, LOG_YN, CODE_MAPPING_YN, MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, VALIDATION_RULE_ID, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, FIELD_FORMAT, FIELD_FORMAT_DESC, FIELD_OPTION, FIELD_REPEAT_CNT )
SELECT #{field.orgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.messageId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.messageFieldId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.sortOrder,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{field.dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.dataLength,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{field.scale,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{field.align,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.filler,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.fieldType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.useMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.requiredYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.fieldTag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.codeGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.defaultValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.testValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.logYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.codeMappingYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.messageFieldName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.messageFieldDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.validationRuleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.fieldFormat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.fieldFormatDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.fieldOption,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field.fieldRepeatCnt,jdbcType=NUMERIC} FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD SET SORT_ORDER = #{dto.sortOrder,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DATA_TYPE = #{dto.dataType}, DATA_LENGTH = #{dto.dataLength,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SCALE = #{dto.scale,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ALIGN = #{dto.align}, FILLER = #{dto.filler}, FIELD_TYPE = #{dto.fieldType}, USE_MODE = #{dto.useMode}, REQUIRED_YN = #{dto.requiredYn}, FIELD_TAG = #{dto.fieldTag}, CODE_GROUP = #{dto.codeGroup}, DEFAULT_VALUE = #{dto.defaultValue}, TEST_VALUE = #{dto.testValue}, REMARK = #{dto.remark}, LOG_YN = #{dto.logYn}, CODE_MAPPING_YN = #{dto.codeMappingYn}, MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME = #{dto.messageFieldName}, MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC = #{dto.messageFieldDesc}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, VALIDATION_RULE_ID = #{dto.validationRuleId}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId}, FIELD_FORMAT = #{dto.fieldFormat}, FIELD_FORMAT_DESC = #{dto.fieldFormatDesc}, FIELD_OPTION = #{dto.fieldOption}, FIELD_REPEAT_CNT = #{dto.fieldRepeatCnt,jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} AND MESSAGE_FIELD_ID = #{messageFieldId}
mapper.sql: mf.ORG_ID AS orgId, mf.MESSAGE_ID AS messageId, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID AS messageFieldId, mf.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, mf.DATA_TYPE AS dataType, mf.DATA_LENGTH AS dataLength, mf.SCALE AS scale, mf.ALIGN AS align, mf.FILLER AS filler, mf.FIELD_TYPE AS fieldType, mf.USE_MODE AS useMode, mf.REQUIRED_YN AS requiredYn, mf.FIELD_TAG AS fieldTag, mf.CODE_GROUP AS codeGroup, mf.DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultValue, mf.TEST_VALUE AS testValue, mf.REMARK AS remark, mf.LOG_YN AS logYn, mf.CODE_MAPPING_YN AS codeMappingYn, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME AS messageFieldName, mf.MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC AS messageFieldDesc, mf.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, mf.VALIDATION_RULE_ID AS validationRuleId, mf.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, mf.FIELD_FORMAT AS fieldFormat, mf.FIELD_FORMAT_DESC AS fieldFormatDesc, mf.FIELD_OPTION AS fieldOption, mf.FIELD_REPEAT_CNT AS fieldRepeatCnt
